situational_context: Running comeback day 68, 14 runs completed (last: Run #14, 6.0 km on Jul 5). ACWR normalized to 1.10 (down from 1.35 on Jun 14) — P0 alert resolved. HRV 7d avg recovered to 37 ms (from 35), all BALANCED status since Jul 3 after a rough UNBALANCED/LOW patch in late June. Training status shifted from Functional Overreaching to Maintaining. Paris heatwave RED alert (3rd of 2026, Météo-France red since Jul 11) — forced and appropriate rest since Jul 7. Traveling to Saint-Malo Jul 12–26 (coastal vacation rental, 20–24°C, GREEN zone) — ideal conditions for running resumption. VO2max running improved to 41.5 (from 40.6 at last state). Demonstrated run tolerance: 7.5 km (Run #12), floor 6 km. Weight: last weigh 103.67 kg on Jun 21, pesée scheduled Jul 12. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest still pending (was due ~July). Chronic load slowly rebuilding at 18.8 (up from 17.5). E-bike commuting remains primary modality on sur-site days (suffer 6–12 per leg). Baby Léonie (6 months) — sleep adequate, no major disruption signals this week.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Marche rapide / footing optionnel (avant train Saint-Malo)
Run #15 — 6-7 km Z2 bord de mer (Saint-Malo)

recommendations.text: Capitalize on Saint-Malo's GREEN conditions (20–24°C) to resume running after 8 days off. Run #15 on Monday at 6–7 km Z2, then Run #16 on Wednesday at 7–8 km Z2. Anchor to demonstrated tolerance (6 km floor, 7.5 km ceiling). If Run #15 goes well, let Run #16 reach 7.5–8 km naturally — do not clamp to the floor.
recommendations.measurable: Two clean runs completed (no tissue pain >24h, no HRV crash >10%)

recommendations.text: Complete Withings pesée on Sunday Jul 12 before departure. Last weigh-in was Jun 21 (103.67 kg) — 19-day gap. Weight data is needed to track the −3 to −5 kg comeback target and calibrate TDEE.
recommendations.measurable: Weigh-in completed Jul 12; weight trend updated

recommendations.text: Schedule Vitamin D retest. Was due ~July 2026 (8 weeks post-comeback). Last result 27 ng/mL (insufficient). Confirm supplementation is raising levels toward 40 ng/mL target before increasing running volume further.
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed or blood drawn within 2 weeks

markers_to_watch.reason: HRV just recovered after a LOW/UNBALANCED patch; watch for regression when running resumes
